title: Thai Maaman
subTitle: Meena refuses to marry Rasappan as he is uneducated and rustic. In order to win her heart, he decides to become a minister and achieve success.

subTitle: An orphan named Thotti Jaya is hired by a mobster after he is spotted thrashing a dishonest man. However, his troubles begin when he falls in love with his boss' daughter.
